title: Skew Poincaré-Birkhoff-Witt extensions over weak $Σ$-rigid rings
abstract: In this paper we introduce the notion of weak $Σ$-rigid ring which extends $α$-rigid rings and $Σ$-rigid rings defined for Ore extensions and skew PBW extensions, respectively. We also present the notion of weak $Σ$-skew Armendariz ring which extends that of $α$-skew Armendariz ring. In this way we generalize several results in the literature, from Ore extensions of injective type to the more general setting of skew PBW extensions.
comment: 12 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1612.06628, arXiv:1611.01562, arXiv:1805.11980
